description: User can create an account using email and password.
User must verify email before first login.
System shall send a unique verification link via email immediately after registration.
User can request a resend of the verification link every 60 seconds.
User must provide first name, last name, email, phone, password, and confirm password during account creation.
Email must be unique.
Password minimum length is 8 characters, maximum length is 12 characters.
Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character (e.g., @, #, $, %, ^, &, *).
Consecutive spaces in the password are forbidden.
Password cannot contain the user's explicit email prefix or username.
Verification link is valid for 24 hours.
Email format must contain '@' and a domain.
Password length must be between 8 and 12 characters.
Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one numeric digit, and one special character.
Password must not contain consecutive spaces.
Password must not contain the user's explicit email prefix or username.
Email must be unique (duplicate email check).
Confirm password must match password.
Meaningful inline error messages must be displayed for duplicate email, invalid password length, or invalid email format.
Email verification system (sending verification link) is required.
Token expiration and resend logic (24-hour validity, 60-second resend cooldown) must be implemented.
